sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5638" key="a)mf" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφ-</orth>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀναφ-</foreign> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμπ-</foreign>), but more commonly for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμφί</foreign> before vowels.</entryFree>
